# unifi_dpi_application_categories (Data Source)

All DPI application categories known to the UniFi controller. Use it to resolve a category id for deep packet inspection grouping.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List DPI application categories, e.g. to resolve the "Social Network" category id for a DPI grouping rule.
data "unifi_dpi_application_categories" "all" {}

output "dpi_category_ids" {
  value = { for c in data.unifi_dpi_application_categories.all.dpi_application_categories : c.name => c.id }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `dpi_application_categories` (Attributes List) The DPI application categories. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--dpi_application_categories))

<a id="nestedatt--dpi_application_categories"></a>
### Nested Schema for `dpi_application_categories`

Read-Only:

- `id` (Number) DPI application category id.
- `name` (String) DPI application category name.
